race.comment: MIN KIATA (4) is on a 10-day back-up after finishing in the money over 1200m at Warrnambool. Draws the fence and is expected to go well again. ENZO CHARLEY (2) showed good early dash and led for most of the way before fading to finish 8 lengths away in fifth over 1400m at Warrnambool. Will push forward and is among the chances in this easier contest. HOPES 'N' DREAMS (3) did little on debut, when a noted drifter, but has been back to the trials, winning an 850m workout at Ararat, so worth another chance. GREEN AMBER (8) is a 17-start maiden who is knocking on the door, the last run a commendable third at Horsham over 1200m. Has her share of ability. Hard to beat in this suitable race.
